title: Jantex Professional Kitchen Multi-Surface Cleaner and Sanitiser Spray - Odourless and Ready To Use | 750ml | Antibacterial BS EN 1276 | CF968 (Pack of 3)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
POWERFUL CLEANER & SANITISER: Effective solution for removing heavy soiling & killing 99.9% of bacteria in just 30 seconds
READY-TO-USE FORMULA: No need to dilute the cleaner before getting to work, making each cleaning task that-bit easier
ACCURATE APPLICATION: Trigger spray ensures accurate application of cleaning solution around the kitchen
RECYCLED PLASTIC: Bottles actively changing to be made from 30% recycled post-consumer plastic
COST-EFFECTIVE 750ML BOTTLE: Each bottle delivers approximately 750 sprays for excellent cost-per-use
ODOURLESS & FOOD SAFE FORMULA: Odourless & food-safe formula prevents tainted ingredients
description: From the manufacturer Features Good hygiene supplies someone can depend on. From chemicals to washroom and waste management essentials Jantex is someone's one stop shop for cleaning perfection. Fight back against dirt, grease, grime and germs with Jantex’s good performance chemicals. With ready to use, concentrated and good concentrated formulas all available, there’s a solution for every need, and every budget here. Good equipment for good results. Mops, buckets and more these supplies will ensure no surface is left untouched. Someone will also find colour coded equipment to reduce the risk of cross contamination when cleaning. Unsanitary washrooms can harm somone's guests’ health, staff’s wellbeing and ultimately, someone's reputation. But with the range, keeping someone's facilities well stocked, clinically clean and smelling fresh at times is made simple. Soap dispensers to cleaning chemicals. Air fresheners to paper hygiene supplies. Someone will find it all here. About Us Jantex was established in 2010 and over the years the product range has grown, chemicals, bins, refuse sacks, mops and buckets, cloths, cleaning trolleys, paper, dispensers and soaps. And products are sold worldwide with a good brand presence in the UK, Europe and Australia. Jantex are registered for the CHSA Manufacturing Standard Accreditation Scheme, Soft Tissue Products. Which means the paper products are fully labelled to include length, width and sheet counts as appropriate and guarantees which the product in the box meets the specification on the label. These products, such as blue roll and the centrefeed rolls, can be identified by the accreditation logo on their packs and literature.
